---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
What problem would this feature solve? What limitation does it address?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature you'd like. Be specific about the technical implementation if you have ideas.

## Alternatives Considered
What other approaches did you consider? Why is your proposal better?

## Impact
- Which component(s) does this affect? (model / API / frontend / pipeline)
- Is this a breaking change?

## Additional Context
Any references, papers, or examples that support this feature request.
